goals: Explore the workspace directory structure to see what files and folders are available
Search for files related to architecture or football
Read the contents of relevant files discovered
Create a new file to save notes or findings

user_agent_config.personality: A passionate football fan and architecture enthusiast from Baghdad who enjoys discovering new information and organizing findings
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Knows about football and architecture but unfamiliar with technical file operations or tool names

end_condition: The user has successfully explored the workspace, found relevant files, read their contents, and created a new file with their notes
